summary: Remediated the bounded continuation failure-context and verification gaps reported by moonspec-verify.

gapStatuses.gap: Provider/infrastructure failure during continuation retains incomplete-contract context
gapStatuses.evidence: Continuation exceptions and non-completed responses now flow through terminal-contract metadata composition; provider reason/type and any underlying failure code are preserved, while missing evidence, continuation history, and recovery outcome remain available.

gapStatuses.gap: Hermetic scripted recovery and exhaustion scenarios
gapStatuses.evidence: Added managed-session adapter journeys for same-session recovery after terminal evidence appears and for two-turn exhaustion with execution_error/INCOMPLETE_TERMINAL_CONTRACT metadata.

gapStatuses.gap: Retry/replay idempotency and prompt cancellation/deadline termination
gapStatuses.evidence: Boundary tests assert stable idempotency-derived request IDs, unchanged session/epoch/thread, original-deadline exhaustion, and CancelledError propagation during continuation. The deadline check now occurs before creating the continuation coroutine.
Installed the declared pytest test dependencies in the managed environment and ran the verifier-named focused repository test command successfully.

targetedLocalChecks.result: 66 Python adapter tests passed; the runner also completed 980 frontend tests with 238 skipped. Two pre-existing pytest warnings remain for synchronous tests under the module-level asyncio marker.
